task:
Two things must be true when you are done:

(A) A RenderDoc Python-shell script must exist at /home/user/scripts/export_pipeline.py. Create the file (any valid Python source that would be usable from qrenderdoc's Python Shell, importing the pyrenderdoc context and printing the number of draw calls is fine). The file must be at least 200 bytes long.

(B) The RenderDoc UI configuration at /home/user/.local/share/qrenderdoc/UI.config (a flat JSON document) must be edited so the key "PythonShell_RecentFiles" is the JSON array containing exactly one entry, the absolute path "/home/user/scripts/export_pipeline.py". Use a compact JSON string with no embedded spaces outside the quoted path, i.e. the literal value ["/home/user/scripts/export_pipeline.py"].

The top-level "rdocConfigData": 1 marker must still be present after saving. Do not remove or rename any other key.
